scripts.desktop:dist: rm -rf apps/web/.next apps/desktop/daemon-bundle /tmp/fxflow-daemon-bundle /tmp/fxflow-template.db && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db pnpm --filter @fxflow/db db:generate && DATABASE_URL=file:/tmp/fxflow-template.db pnpm --filter @fxflow/db exec prisma migrate deploy && cp /tmp/fxflow-template.db apps/desktop/assets/template.db && pnpm --filter @fxflow/web build && bash scripts/fix-standalone-native.sh && pnpm --filter @fxflow/daemons --prod deploy --legacy /tmp/fxflow-daemon-bundle && cp -R /tmp/fxflow-daemon-bundle apps/desktop/daemon-bundle && pnpm --filter @fxflow/desktop electron:build && cd apps/desktop && GH_OWNER=local GH_REPO=local pnpm electron:package --arm64 --publish never
